data.title: Cloud-based Infrastructure
data.description: Adobe's cloud infrastructure supports its SaaS offerings, enabling seamless access and scalability for users.
data.technical_spec: Uses AWS and Microsoft Azure for hosting cloud services.

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Adobe utilizes a microservices architecture to ensure modular development and scalability for its applications.
data.technical_spec: Docker and Kubernetes for container orchestration.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: A distributed CDN is used to deliver content with low latency to worldwide users.

data.title: Multi-Tenancy Support
data.description: Architecture supports multiple clients on a shared infrastructure with isolated application instances.

data.title: API-First Design
data.description: Emphasis on API-first design ensures integration with third-party services and internal components.
